brief_notes: Strong mechanistic study with excellent experimental logic. The progression from macrophage to HEK293T systems, then TEV protease rescue and cis vs trans processing experiments, is well-reasoned. Good use of multiple orthogonal approaches (fluorescence microscopy, western blot, co-IP). Writing is clear and precise. Weaknesses: Methods could include more detail on lentiviral transduction efficiency and cell quantification, some figures are referenced but absent, and the discussion of why C254A may have additional roles beyond catalysis is speculative without further data. Statistical methods are clearly described.
